appName.description: Extension name displayed in Chrome Web Store and browser.

appShortName.description: Short brand name used in in-page panels.

appDescription.message: Links Ani-Gamer, Disney+, Netflix, and Hami Video pages to popular anime tracking and rating sites, and shows copyable multilingual titles.

optionsIntro.message: Toggle any platform on or off; click ↗ to open its homepage in a new tab. Platforms without a confirmed title ID will open a search result.

sectionTrackingIntro.message: For managing plan-to-watch, watching, completed, and episode progress.

sectionRatingsIntro.message: Japanese-language platforms add ratings, reviews, and rankings from a different audience.

sectionStreamingIntro.message: Shown only on MyAnimeList and AniList detail pages. Links open a search on the streaming site; availability still depends on your account and region.

restoredMessage.message: Defaults restored — click Save to apply.

loadingFetchingTitles.message: Fetching Traditional Chinese and Japanese titles

loadingAiAlias.message: Asking on-device AI for alias suggestions

retryHint.message: Please refresh the page and try again.

streamingNotice.message: Search results only confirm current availability; actual streaming depends on account, region, and licensing.

seasonWarning.message: Season splits, OVAs, and movies in the same franchise can have similar names — please double-check the year and format before adding to a list.

errorNoAnimeTitle.message: Could not find an anime title on this page

errorNoCrossSiteData.message: No cross-site data for this anime

errorLocalAiUnavailable.message: This Chrome build does not provide an on-device AI model

errorLocalAiFormat.message: The on-device AI did not return a verifiable alias format

errorLocalAiNoAlias.message: The on-device AI returned no usable aliases

errorLocalAiNoMatch.message: No AI-suggested alias matched any database entry

warningLocalAiAlias.message: On-device AI suggested the alias "$ALIAS$" and it matched a database entry — please verify the title before adding to a list.

platformAnilistDescription.message: Progress, stats, ratings, and social features

platformBangumiDescription.message: Collection, tags, ratings, and Chinese metadata

platformAnidbDescription.message: Detailed release data, MyList, ratings, and reviews

platformAnnictDescription.message: Japanese anime watch progress and per-episode tracking

platformSimklDescription.message: Cross-media tracking for anime, shows, and movies

platformLivechartDescription.message: Seasonal chart, air-time reminders, watch status, and community ratings

platformFilmarksDescription.message: Japanese five-star ratings, reviews, and satisfaction rankings

platformAnikoreDescription.message: Japanese anime reviews, trait scoring, and overall rankings

platformImdbDescription.message: Ratings and reviews from a general film & TV audience; season splits may differ from MAL

platformAnimegamerDescription.message: Search Ani-Gamer by title to check current availability

platformNetflixDescription.message: Search Netflix by title; results depend on account and region

platformHamivideoDescription.message: Search Hami Video by title to check current availability
